allow: Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to set URL of front document to "http://localhost:8765/"')

Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to do JavaScript "\(function\(\){var btn=document.querySelector\(\\"[data-source=generate]\\"\);if\(!btn\)return \\"NO_BTN\\";btn.click\(\);return \\"clicked, active=\\"+btn.classList.contains\(\\"active\\"\)+\\" state.source=\\"+state.source+\\" nextDisabled=\\"+document.querySelector\(\\"#nextBtn\\"\).disabled;}\)\(\);" in front document')
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to activate' -e 'tell application "Safari" to make new document with properties {URL:"http://localhost:8765/"}')

Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to do JavaScript "var btn=document.querySelector\(\\"[data-source=generate]\\"\); var r1=btn?\\"FOUND\\":\\"NOTFOUND\\"; if\(btn\){btn.click\(\); r1+=\\" active=\\"+btn.classList.contains\(\\"active\\"\)+\\" srcState=\\"+\(typeof state!==\\"undefined\\"?state.source:\\"NO_STATE\\"\)+\\" nextDisabled=\\"+document.querySelector\(\\"#nextBtn\\"\).disabled;} r1;" in front document')
Bash(mkdir -p legacy src/lib src/context src/components/customer src/components/ops src/views public)
